ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* US size equivalent */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* UK size equivalent */,
  "eu_size" INTEGER /* EU size equivalent */,
  "br_size" TEXT /* Brazilian size equivalent */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement range */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement range */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement range */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of clothing (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size standard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the size standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "restock_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold quantity for restocking */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the physical location of the inventory */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last restock date */,
  "next_restock_date" TEXT /* Predicted date for the next restock */,
  "sales_volume" INTEGER /* Total sales volume for the inventory item */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Score indicating the popularity of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each size standard
Type of clothing (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses)
Timestamp for when the size standard was created
Timestamp for the last update to the size standard
